query:
SELECT 
  mc.name as categoria,
  mi.name as produto,
  mi.price as preco_centavos,
  ROUND(mi.price / 100.0, 2) as preco_reais,
  mi.isAvailable
FROM menu_items mi
JOIN menu_categories mc ON mi.categoryId = mc.id
ORDER BY mc.displayOrder, mi.displayOrder;
